title: levisticum officinale
intro: Levisticum officinale, also known as garden angelica or wild celery, is a plant species in the parsley family. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Levisticum officinale include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Levisticum officinale can be made into teas, tinctures, or dried roots, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
